title: A733 wait-state monitor after H144 no-patch audit

checks.result: A733 RTC remains v1 PATCH 0/7; A733 CCU/PRCM remains PATCH RFC 0/8; A733 pinctrl remains RFC 0/9.
Direct lore query attempts returned HTTP 403 from the local script; external search found no public A733 sunxi-mmc IDMAC descriptor-read hit.
Machine gates 01-07 remain closed. Gate 08 remains human-only b4 send --reflect review.

decision: No new kernel behavior patch. Runtime testing is in a wait state until maintainer/vendor feedback or a source-backed new lead appears. Upstream DTS prep is in a human reflect-review wait state.
next_action: Human may run the H142 reflect-only command on Strix. Otherwise continue periodic monitor: dependency recheck, public/list reply check, then only queue a runtime test if a concrete new register, reset/clock order, firmware handoff, master ID, binding, or erratum appears.
